content.body:
- Remove stale profiles/ references (retired in #66)
- Drop "Adding a profile" section (profile system is gone)
- Link to new repo surface manifest
- Document future-package naming convention so contributors don't invent alternate names for Watchman/Drafter/Gardener/etc. when those components land

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
